user_system_path: Identity-architecture seam (#511), Stage 3: make Google the sole sign-in identity and demote Microsoft to a connectable data surface. Removes AzureADProvider from NextAuth (lib/auth/auth-options.ts) and the 'Continue with Microsoft' button from /login and /start, so one person maps to one Foldera account (prevents the split-brain from re-forming). Microsoft stays linkable as a SOURCE via the existing /api/microsoft/connect + callback flow for a signed-in Google user (untouched). Stage 1 link-guard already merged (PR #512); the account consolidation was executed (e40b7cd8 -> 2cbc1bab, see #509 receipt).
allowed_files_raw: Stage 3: lib/auth/auth-options.ts (drop AzureADProvider + its orphaned imports; keep azure-ad jwt-callback branches harmless); app/login/login-inner.tsx and app/start/page.tsx (remove the Continue with Microsoft sign-in button + copy); lib/auth/__tests__/auth-options.test.ts (assert Google is the only sign-in provider, azure-ad absent). Control-plane governance files. The Microsoft surface-linking flow (app/api/microsoft/connect + callback) and the dashboard connect button are intentionally UNTOUCHED.
forbidden_files_raw: No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. Do NOT remove or alter the /api/microsoft/connect surface-linking flow (Microsoft must stay connectable as a source). No auto-send.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npx vitest run lib/auth/__tests__/auth-options.test.ts app/api/microsoft/callback/__tests__/route.test.ts app/api/google/callback/__tests__/route.test.ts
required_browser_proof: Live: /login and /start show only 'Continue with Google' (no Microsoft sign-in); a signed-in Google user can still connect Microsoft as a source from settings. Owner-side validation.
browser_proof_command: manual: load /login and /start (only Google sign-in present); from dashboard settings, connect Microsoft as a source and confirm it links to the same account.
acceptance_condition: AzureADProvider removed from NextAuth providers; /login and /start expose only Google sign-in; the Microsoft connect-a-source flow (/api/microsoft/connect + callback) is unchanged; gate:continuity + typecheck green; auth-options + both callback test suites green.
anti_regression_checks: auth-options test asserts providers include google and NOT azure-ad
microsoft + google callback (connect-a-source) tests still green
no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
/api/microsoft/connect + callback routes unchanged (Microsoft still linkable as a source)
stop_condition: Stage 3 lands as a PR on claude/identity-stage3-511 targeting #511; gate:continuity + typecheck + the named test suites green. Live login-screen validation is owner-side. Remaining owner action: set Vercel OWNER_USER_ID/FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID to 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f.
next_command: Owner: merge Stage 3. Set Vercel OWNER_USER_ID/FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID to the surviving account (2cbc1bab-...). Sign in with Google to confirm the full merged account. Optional next: Scout #494 activation.
